summary: OEM hardware specification sheet for e-Orbit (model NF14)

spec_rows.value:
Total: 250 user groups、• Fingerprint: up to 100 • Password: up to 100 • IC Card: up to 100
•Face + Palm Vein: up to 50  • Fingerprint / Password / IC Card: 250 sets
•Face up to 100  • Fingerprint: up to 100 • Password: up to 100 • IC Card: up to 100

Face Recognition,Palm Vein， Fingerprint, Password, IC Card, Tuya Smart APP，Tongtong APP
Password length: 6-9 digits
Tuya Smart APP, Tongtong APP + Mechanical Key

• False Acceptance Rate (FAR): < 0.001%
• False Rejection Rate (FRR): < 2%

Standard: 6068 Lock Body
Optional: 85 / 90 Lock Body

• WiFi Module: Tuya WiFi
• Applicable Door Thickness: 38-120mm
• Operating Temperature: -20℃ ~ 55℃
• Static Current: ≤ 120µA
• Dynamic Current: ≤ 4A
Matte Grey, Matte Black, Mocha Gold

• Front Panel: 425 × 69 × 49 mm
• Rear Panel: 430 × 70 × 70 mm
• Single Unit Size: 47 × 22.5 × 12 cm / 4.2 kg
• Carton Size (6 units): 49 × 39 × 46.5 cm / 26 kg
• Applicable Doors: Wooden Doors, Steel Doors, Entry Doors
Tuya-22 Languages (including Simplified/Traditional Chinese, English, Spanish, Portuguese, French, Russian, Arabic, etc.)   Tongtong-2 Languages：Chinese、English

Actual grade: IP68   IP68 is available by custom order only.   Rear panel is not waterproof.
Suggest inform customers as IP66
WiFi: Tuya WiFi / Tongtong WiFi，all built-in WiFi, no extra gateway needed。

ingestion_caveats: User-capacity counts in the OEM XLS reflect Tuya/Tongtong firmware tiers and have historically conflicted with the NX5 menu text — do not promote them as canonical without commercial confirmation.
IP rating row carries an OEM-side caveat: actual grade IP68 is custom-order; suggested customer-facing grade is IP66; rear panel is not waterproof.
